title: Principal Plant Manager at Sika India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Sika India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Sika India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sika India Asia Pacific Associates:
Sika India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sika India Asia Pacific Associates!
